summary: The diff adds a migration module (backend/migration.mo) and modifies backend/main.mo and project_state.json. The project_state.json marks both requirements as 'pending', and the backend/main.mo is truncated so the resetMaintenanceFund function cannot be confirmed. No frontend changes are present. Neither REQ-1 nor REQ-2 appear to be implemented based on available evidence.

missing_requirements.requirement: Implement an admin-only resetMaintenanceFund function in the Motoko backend actor that resets the maintenance fund balance and related state, restricted to users with the admin role.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend/main.mo diff is truncated and does not show a resetMaintenanceFund function. The project_state.json explicitly marks AR-1 (REQ-1) as pending. No evidence of the function, admin role check, balance reset logic, or success/error result variant is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Wire the existing Reset Fund admin button in the MaintenanceManagement frontend component to call the new resetMaintenanceFund backend function via a React Query mutation hook, displaying a success or error toast on completion.
missing_requirements.reason: No frontend files were added or modified in the diff. There is no useResetMaintenanceFund hook in frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts, no mutation wiring, no toast integration, and no changes to the MaintenanceManagement component. The project_state.json marks AR-2 (REQ-2) as pending.

hallucinated_features.description: A new backend/migration.mo module was added defining old/new actor state types and a migration function.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding a migration module or any migration infrastructure. This file was not requested.
